/usr/bin/c++ -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/robot_ble_communicator.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/robot_ble_communicator.dir/test/main.cpp.o -o /workspace/bin/robot_ble_communicator  /workspace/lib/librbc_ble.a -lbluetooth -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglog.so.0.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so.2.2.2
